Common.tagline: Open-source AI avatar generator powered by your own API key.
Common.supportLine: No login. No database. No subscriptions. Self-host anywhere.

Home.metaTitle: Simi Avatar — Open-source AI avatar generator
Home.metaDescription: Open-source AI avatar generator powered by your own API key. No login, no database, no subscription. Self-host anywhere.
Home.heroSubtitle: Open-source AI avatar generator powered by your own API key.
Home.heroSupport: No login. No database. No subscriptions. Self-host anywhere.
Home.byokBody: Plug in your own OpenAI or MiniMax key and generate avatars instantly — no accounts, no middlemen.
Home.privacyBody: Your key and images are used only for a single request and are never stored or logged.
Home.openSourceBody: MIT licensed and fully self-hostable. Read the code, fork it, deploy it anywhere.
Home.extensibleBody: A clean provider abstraction makes adding new AI image models straightforward.

Generate.title: Generate your avatar
Generate.subtitle: Bring your own API key. Nothing is stored.
Generate.privacyNote: Your image and API key are only used for this generation request. Simi Avatar does not store your API key or images.

states.idle: Configure the form and click Generate.

Source.label: Avatar source
Source.textDescription: Describe an avatar — no photo needed.
Source.photoDescription: Upload a photo and restyle it.

Mode.label: Mode
Mode.textDescription: Pick a style, add a short description, and generate — no photo needed.
Mode.couple-textDescription: Describe a couple and generate a style-matched pair — no photos needed.
Mode.themedDescription: Generate from a theme and prompt — no photo needed.
Mode.singleDescription: Restyle your own photo into an avatar.
Mode.coupleDescription: Generate a style-consistent pair for two people.

Provider.label: Provider
Provider.regionHint: MiniMax Global and China use separate keys and endpoints.

Upload.label: Upload image
Upload.hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP. Up to 10MB, at least 256×256.

Form.promptPlaceholder: e.g. blue background, soft lighting, friendly smile
Form.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. a friendly portrait with a warm smile, soft studio lighting
Form.pairedConsistencyHint: Share palette, background, lighting and composition across both avatars.

Suggestions.label: Need ideas? Try a starter prompt:

Result.empty: Your generated avatar will appear here.
Result.emptySuccess: The provider returned no images. Please try again.

Errors.INVALID_API_KEY: The API key is invalid or was rejected by the provider.
Errors.INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS: Your provider account is out of credits or quota.
Errors.INVALID_IMAGE: The uploaded image could not be read.
Errors.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: The image is too large. Please use a smaller file.
Errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.
Errors.INVALID_MODE_INPUT: The inputs do not match the selected mode.
Errors.INVALID_REGION: The key does not match the selected MiniMax region.
Errors.PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: The provider took too long to respond. Please try again.
Errors.CONTENT_REJECTED: The request was blocked by the provider's content policy.
Errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
Errors.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: Unsupported request type. Please submit the form again.
Errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Errors.MISSING_API_KEY: Please enter your API key first.

About.title: About Simi Avatar
About.intro: Simi Avatar is an open-source, no-signup, BYOK AI avatar generator. You bring your own provider API key and generate avatars from a text description or from your own photo.
About.modelsBody: OpenAI gpt-image-1 and MiniMax image-01 (Global and China regions).
About.securityBody: Your API key and images pass through the server only in memory for a single request, and are never stored or logged.
About.deployBody: Self-host anywhere that runs Next.js. The reference deployment target is Cloudflare Workers.

Legal.title: Legal
Legal.disclaimerBody: Simi Avatar is provided as-is, without warranty. You are responsible for your own API key usage and any content you generate.
Legal.termsBody: Do not use Simi Avatar to generate illegal, sexual, hateful content, or to deceptively impersonate real people.
Legal.privacyBody: Simi Avatar stores no data. Your API key lives only in your browser session; images and keys are used only for a single generation request and are never persisted or logged.
